120:         // license:artifact is a many-to-many relationship.
121:         // Each artifact may have several licenses.
122:         // Each artifact may appear multiple times in the map.
123:         dependencies.parallelStream().forEach(artifact -> getLicensesFromArtifact(artifact).forEach(license -> {
